name: Banana-Walnut Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, soda, salt, and cinnamon into a bowl.
2. Add sugar, shortening, egg, milk, and mashed bananas to the dry ingredients. Beat until smooth, about 2 minutes.
3. Stir in walnuts and oats.
4. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto greased cookie sheets.
5. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (375°F) for 12 to 15 minutes.
